name: SHENZHEN TOPRAYSOLAR Co.,Ltd.
summary: SHENZHEN TOPRAYSOLAR Co.,Ltd. operates as an integrated solar manufacturer in China, Europe, North America, Africa, and internationally. The company offers solar glasses, solar cells, solar wafers, and solar ingots. It also provides on grid and off grid solar panels, such as mono and poly crystalline solar panels; and regular, flexible, folding, and solar blanket panels. In addition, the company offers solar consumer products comprising solar chargers that include electronic chargers, automotive products, charge regulators, and accessories; solar power kits; solar lightings; and solar home improvement products, as well as solar battery chips, solar power systems, solar energy absorbers, and water heater systems. Further, it provides EPC services, which comprise design, procurement, installation, and civic works, as well as operation and maintenance services for solar projects. It also develops and operates solar power plants with a capacity of 110MW in Dingbian, China. The company was founded in 1992 and is headquartered in Shenzhen, China.
